headline: Syariah criminal jurisdiction expanded in 3 states
context: Three states expanded the scope of their syariah criminal jurisdiction in 2024, increasing penalties and adding new offences.

cards.big: 3 states expanded syariah criminal offences and penalties in 2024
cards.sub: Kelantan, Terengganu, and Kedah added 12 new syariah offences combined

cards.big: Syariah Courts (Criminal Jurisdiction) Act 1965 caps penalties at 3-5-6 formula
cards.sub: States continue to push boundaries of syariah criminal powers

cards.big: Article 3 establishes Islam as religion of Federation while protecting other faiths
cards.sub: Expanding syariah jurisdiction raises questions about constitutional balance

cards.big: New offences include social media content rules affecting 4.2 million Muslims
cards.sub: Daily activities increasingly regulated by expanding syariah provisions

cards.big: Expanding criminal jurisdiction over personal conduct is not protecting faith
Sisters in Islam challenged new Kelantan provisions in constitutional review
